places.name: Times Square
places.address: Times Square, Manhattan, New York, NY 10036, USA

reviews.author: Sarah Johnson
reviews.text: Incredible! The energy here is unmatched. Definitely a must-visit when in NYC. The bright lights and bustling atmosphere is truly something special.

reviews.author: Mike Chen
reviews.text: Amazing atmosphere but very crowded. Go early in the morning for fewer people. Still worth seeing though!

reviews.author: Emma Davis
reviews.text: The lights, the energy, the people! This is what NYC is all about! Breathtaking experience.

reviews.author: James Wilson
reviews.text: Worth visiting at least once. Best at night when all the lights are on. The Broadway theaters add to the experience.

reviews.author: Lisa Anderson
reviews.text: Breathtaking! The scale and grandeur of Times Square never gets old. A true iconic landmark!

places.description: Times Square is a major commercial intersection and famous tourist destination in Midtown Manhattan. Known for its bright LED screens, Broadway theaters, and vibrant atmosphere.

places.name: Eiffel Tower

reviews.author: Pierre Leblanc
reviews.text: Un monument magnifique! The views from the top are spectacular. Worth every euro spent!

reviews.author: Anna Schmidt
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning! Worth climbing all those stairs for the view. The engineering is impressive!

reviews.author: Marco Rossi
reviews.text: Beautiful but very crowded. Book tickets online to skip the line. Still amazing!

reviews.author: Sophie Dubois
reviews.text: Magical at night! The tower sparkles beautifully every hour. Romantic and unforgettable!

reviews.author: Luis Garcia
reviews.text: Great experience. The iron structure is impressive up close. The city views are breathtaking!

places.description: The Eiffel Tower is an iconic iron lattice tower built in 1889. Standing 330 meters tall, it's one of the most recognizable monuments in the world and a symbol of Paris.

places.name: Statue of Liberty
places.address: Liberty Island, New York, NY 10004, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer White
reviews.text: Incredible! Standing in front of the statue gives you goosebumps. A symbol of freedom!

reviews.author: David Brown
reviews.text: Amazing experience. Book ferry tickets in advance to save time. The ferry ride is part of the experience!

reviews.author: Maria Garcia
reviews.text: A symbol of freedom! Worth the journey to Liberty Island. Powerful and moving!

reviews.author: Robert Taylor
reviews.text: Beautiful views of the skyline from the ferry. The statue is even more impressive in person!

reviews.author: Anna Lee
reviews.text: Powerful and moving. A must-see when visiting NYC! Don't miss it!

places.description: The Statue of Liberty is a colossal neoclassical sculpture located on Liberty Island. A gift from France to the United States, it has become an iconic symbol of freedom.

places.name: Big Ben
places.address: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London SW1A 1AA, UK

reviews.author: James Smith
reviews.text: Iconic landmark! The Gothic architecture is stunning. Perfect photo spot!

reviews.author: Eleanor Bennett
reviews.text: Beautiful structure. Tours of the House of Parliament are available but require booking in advance.

reviews.author: Thomas Murphy
reviews.text: Absolutely magnificent! The clock tower is impressive both day and night.

reviews.author: Catherine Brown
reviews.text: Great historical significance. The River Thames view adds to the beauty!

reviews.author: William Davis
reviews.text: One of the most recognizable structures in the world. A must-see in London!

places.description: Big Ben, officially known as the Great Bell, is part of the Palace of Westminster in London. The iconic clock tower is one of the most recognizable structures in the world.
